name: Aphelandra
description:
__Affiliations:__ Kuja Pirates

Aphelandra is a member of a tribe of Kuja living on the island of Amazon Lily. She is large-sized human who accompanied Marguerite and Sweet Pea when they found Luffy covered in mushrooms. Despite her size, Aphelandra has shown to be rather timid, often repeating what others have said to her as she obeys their command. She is a kind and innocent woman.
